steps.title: Use the weed context
steps.content: The sentence describes unwelcome weeds that spread easily and quickly become unmanageable. The blank must name the action gardeners would try to take against that spread.

steps.title: Choose the stopping word
steps.content: A would mean fetching the spread, B would mean preserving it, and D does not fit grammatically with "the spread." "Halting" means stopping, which matches what is difficult when weeds spread quickly. The answer is C.
